plot outline: One of the few remaining drone repairmen assigned to Earth, its surface devastated after decades of war with the alien Scavs, discovers a crashed spacecraft with contents that bring into question everything he believed about the war, and may even put the fate of mankind in his hands.
title: Oblivion
akas: Yi Luo Zhan Jing (China, Mandarin title)

special effects companies.name: Graphics Lab, Institute for Creative Technologies, University of Southern California
